summary: Card Preview Flow & Back Button feature verified. All 8 features tested and working correctly: (1) Congrats create page shows 'Preview Card' button, (2) Birthday create page shows 'Preview Card' button, (3) Congrats preview shows 'Thank You!' headline with photo, name, message, Edit/Create&Send buttons, (4) Birthday preview shows 'Happy Birthday!' headline with confetti, photo, Edit/Create&Send buttons, (5) /congrats/{cardId} view has Back button, (6) /birthday/{cardId} view has Back button, (7) Edit button returns to form, (8) Share options visible after card creation.
critical_code_review_comments: create-congrats.tsx: 3 states (form, preview, created) with proper state management via useState
create-congrats.tsx line 81-91: handlePreview() validates name and photo before showing preview
create-congrats.tsx line 464-472: Preview Card button with data-testid='congrats-preview-btn' and eye icon
create-congrats.tsx line 348-369: Preview card shows 'Thank You!' headline in gold (#C9A962)
create-congrats.tsx line 373-396: Edit and Create & Send buttons with proper data-testids
create-birthday-card.tsx: Same 3-state pattern with pink (#FF6B8A) theming
create-birthday-card.tsx line 350-354: Confetti dots in preview with multiple colors
create-birthday-card.tsx line 356: 'Happy Birthday!' headline in pink
[cardId].tsx congrats line 163-170: Back button with data-testid='congrats-card-back-btn'
[cardId].tsx birthday line 125-132: Back button with data-testid='birthday-card-back-btn'
Share options include: Copy Link, Download, View Card, SMS, Email, Facebook, Twitter
seed_data_creation: Used existing birthday card (03e07c66-04b) and congrats card (2f803229-77e) for testing card view pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Card preview flow works correctly. Key flows: (1) Fill form -> Preview Card button -> Preview state (shows card preview with Edit/Create&Send) -> Edit goes back to form OR Create&Send finalizes -> Share options screen. (2) Card view pages (/congrats/{cardId} and /birthday/{cardId}) have Back buttons at top that use router.back(). All data-testids are in place for congrats: congrats-preview-btn, congrats-preview-card, congrats-preview-edit, congrats-preview-send, congrats-card-back-btn. For birthday: birthday-preview-btn, birthday-preview-card, birthday-preview-edit, birthday-preview-send, birthday-card-back-btn.
